mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prd_requisition (id, bill_no, bill_date, prd_order_id, prd_order_no, warehouse_id, workshop_id, workshop, bill_type, bill_status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{billNo}, #{billDate}, #{prdOrderId}, #{prdOrderNo}, #{warehouseId}, #{workshopId}, #{workshop}, #{billType}, #{billStatus}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
